title: VERIFICATION_RESULT
description: Response from the Keeper to a VERIFICATION_QUERY. Returns a result entry for each hash in target_hashes, in the same order.

incident_id.description: Identifier of the incident subject to verification. Echoed from the corresponding VERIFICATION_QUERY.

results.description: Verification result for each hash in target_hashes, in the same order as the request.

target_hash.description: The hash value that was queried.

matched.description: Whether a matching anchor record was found within the requested time range.

matched_record.description: The matching anchor record if found, null if matched is false.

claim_id.description: claim_id of the matching CLAIM_ANCHOR record.

terminal_id.description: terminal_id of the party that submitted the anchor.

timestamp.description: Timestamp at which the anchor was recorded by the Keeper.

data_hash.description: The hash value stored in the anchor record.

public_key.description: Ed25519 public key associated with the terminal, if registered. Null if not recorded.
